title: SQL Injection Attack on Production WAF
summary: Automated SQLi scanner detected targeting production web application search endpoint.

title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Attempt
summary: Reflected XSS payload detected in query parameter targeting login page.

title: Critical RCE Vulnerability — OpenSSL CVE-2024-5678
summary: OpenSSL buffer overflow vulnerability (CVSS 9.8) detected on primary database server.

title: LFI Path Traversal Attack
summary: Local File Inclusion attempt via directory traversal in file upload endpoint.

title: Brute Force SSH Login Attempt
summary: Distributed SSH brute force from 15 source IPs against dev API server.

title: Suspicious Outbound Data Transfer
summary: Unusual outbound traffic pattern detected from production web server (potential data exfiltration).
